title: different result of in expression when table has index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 BIT(4));
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE c1 IN (SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = 'test') AND c3 IN (CAST(@b AS BIT(4)));
key_bug_features: different results with and without index on in expression
